name: avatar-upload
label: Avatar Upload
description: A circular avatar picker with a built-in crop-and-resize modal. Click the circle to choose a JPG or PNG, position it, and the cropped image syncs to a Livewire property.

props.name: src
props.description: Current avatar URL, shown as the initial preview.

props.name: wireTarget
props.description: Livewire property to set with the cropped base64 PNG after applying.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Fallback image URL shown when src is empty.

usage: Loads Croppie + Exif-JS from a CDN automatically. Use inside a Livewire component for wireTarget to work, then base64_decode() the value to store it.
